samples.diagnosis: The generated image closely matches the reference, with only minor visual differences in line smoothness and point alignment, but all shapes, colors, labels, and topology are preserved.
The generated figure uses yellow for the theoretical line instead of green, and the right-hand plot's y-axis label is truncated, but all shapes, data points, and layout are otherwise preserved.
The generated image uses dashed lines for connections while the reference uses solid lines, and the shading of triangles differs slightly in intensity and fill pattern.
The generated image has the correct line shapes and topology but uses different colors for the lines compared to the reference, and the legend labels are misaligned with the actual line colors.
The generated image closely matches the reference, with only minor differences in line thickness and slight variations in the curvature of the black hole shape.
The generated image closely matches the reference in shape, color, and layout, with only minor visual differences in line smoothness and grid alignment.
The generated image has minor topological and positional differences, such as missing or misplaced connections in diagrams 5B, 5C, and 6A, and slight variations in node placement and ellipse shapes.
The generated chart's y-axis scale is severely distorted (logarithmic vs linear), and bar heights are grossly incorrect, making the entire plot shape unrecognizable compared to the reference.
The generated image omits the red dashed cycle within V1 and has a different routing for the blue dashed path P2, while other elements like node positions and main paths are preserved.
The generated figure omits the dashed lines in the I_n and I_n* diagrams and has incorrect line connections in IV*, III*, and II*, altering topology and spatial layout.
The generated image has minor differences in line routing and node placement compared to the reference, but all components and connections are present with correct topology.
The generated image uses solid spheres and different colors instead of the reference's wireframe spheres with specific shading and line styles, altering topology and visual semantics.
The generated image accurately replicates all key elements, but the green welfare loss triangle is slightly misshapen and the 'Welfare loss' label is positioned differently compared to the reference.
The generated image omits the prominent red vertical line segment present in the reference image, which is a visually significant element.
The generated image perfectly matches the reference in all aspects including shapes, line styles, colors, topology, and spatial layout.
The generated image has a slightly different aspect ratio and the legend box is positioned differently, but all data points, line styles, colors, and labels are preserved.
The generated image perfectly matches the reference in all aspects including shapes, line styles, colors, topology, connections, relative positions, spatial layout, and aspect ratio.
The generated image replaces the solid black dots in the middle layer with hollow diamond shapes, which is a visually discernible difference from the reference.

The generated image has inverted the triangular shapes (peaks pointing up instead of down) and altered the line styles, but retains all key elements and overall layout.

The generated image omits the prominent gray feedback lines labeled 'automatic differentiation' that connect the loss block back to the parameter blocks, which are visually prominent in the reference.

The generated image has slightly different line thicknesses and minor alignment shifts in the legend, but all curves and labels are present with correct styles and topology.
The generated image has an extra horizontal arrow on the x-axis and a slightly different arc placement compared to the reference, but all key elements are present and correctly positioned.
